effects.text: An exit sign is above the locked door.
The exit door opens. You escape.
The brass key unlocks the door.
It is small enough to carry.
You pick up the brass key.
The red key unlocks the red door.
The green key unlocks the green door.
The blue key unlocks the blue door.
A click comes from the exit door.
A click comes from the exit door.
A click comes from the exit door.
It is small enough to carry.
You pick up the green key.
It is small enough to carry.
You pick up the blue key.
It is small enough to carry.
You pick up the red key.
